PD MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE PC 1538,5, FILED

/CAL: BENCH WARRANT STAY FOR 04-26-22 FAILURE TO APPEAR/INTC/BWSTAY: 04-26-22/X: AS PART OF A NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION, THE PEOPLE MOVE TO DISMISS THIS CASE PURSUANT TO PC 1385,/MO GRTD/X:THE DEFENDANT ENTERS A HARVEY WAIVER, /X:ANY RESTITUTION OR OTHER MATTERS RESULTING FROM DISMISSED CHARGES MAYBEADDED AS TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE SENTENCE IN COURT NO,21007156,/SATERM/EMTERM/

/CAL: DISPOSITION/CONTD PROC RE BW;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND  STAYED TO05-10-22,/X: BAIL SET AT $5000,/DOPC/LDPX: 05-20-22 (STIP 60)/

/CAL ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/X AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BEPLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF SHALL BE FITTD WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE ASET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70OAK GROVE/X SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/TEXT DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/LDPX 04-18-22/X CUSTODY STATUS REMAINS AS SET,/SAORD/SA4 AREA BOUNDED BYPOLK STREET TO WEST ABOVE MARKET, MCALLISTER TO MARKET, MARKET EAST TO WT WITH 6TH AS EAST BOUNDARY, HOWARD IS SOUTHERN BOUNDARY, AND 10TH IS WESRN BOUNDARY, SAN FRANCISCO CA/WS/CONTD PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL: DISPOSITION/INTC/X: DEFENDANT ENTERS A LIMITED TIME WAIVER/STIPLD:05-20-22(60)/CONT/DOP/
/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/INTC/X: DEFENDANT ENTERS A LIMITED TIME WAIVER//STIPLD: 04-29-22(60)/
/CAL: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/INTC/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING & DEFENSE MOTION TO SUPPRESS/DOP/TE: 1 HOUR/LDPX: 04-18-22(60)/
